decisions.decision: Phase auto-advance is a side-effect of sync_work_order(), not a separate patrol job
decisions.rationale: Keeps phase truth consistent on every sync instead of waiting for patrol tick

decisions.decision: Suppress backward transition warnings during auto-sync; only warn on manual phase-set
decisions.rationale: Work order status regression (e.g., review fail → back to implementing) is legitimate; warnings would be noise

decisions.decision: Commands read work order automation state as primary, phase as fallback
decisions.rationale: Gradual migration; features not yet in work order system still use phase
